title: Phantoms Begone!
description: A mod to counter phantoms more effectively making them more bearable.
body:
# Phantoms Begone!

Night Crystal Ores generate from Y levels -64 to 75. They can be smelted down into Night Crystals which can be used to craft the **Phantom Repellent**.

## Phantom Repellent

This item grants the user infinite **Night Vision** when held in the inventory. It also kills any phantoms in a 50 block radius.
